name: Aryan Kapoor
bio: Met during freshman orientation. We used to pull all-nighters before exams and grab biryani at 2am. He moved to Bangalore for a software job but we still talk whenever we can.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: My first team lead at my internship. She taught me more about professional communication than any course ever did. We grab coffee every few weeks when she's in town.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: We grew up on the same street and played cricket every evening until we were 16. Life took us different ways but every time we reconnect it feels like no time passed.

name: Priya Menon
bio: We were in the same machine learning study group in final year. She's now doing a PhD in Toronto. We do monthly video calls to keep each other accountable on personal goals.

name: James O'Brien
bio: We bonded over a shared frustration during a hackathon that went sideways. Now we're each other's first call when something exciting or terrible happens at work.

name: Fatima Al-Zahra
bio: Our families have been close since before I was born. She's been living in Dubai for five years now. I always mean to reach out more but time slips away faster than I expect.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: We shared a flat for two years and survived on instant noodles and deadlines together. He's teaching at a university now and somehow still finds time to check in every week.

name: Sofia Reyes
bio: We met in a React developers Discord server and started a friendly competition to build projects. She's a freelance developer in Mexico City and one of the most driven people I know.

name: Daniel Osei
bio: We worked at the same startup for a year before it folded. He's the person who convinced me that failure is just an expensive lesson. Currently building his own product in Accra.

name: Mei Lin Chen
bio: We met at a design workshop three years ago and immediately clicked over our obsession with good UX. She's a product designer in Singapore and our late-night voice chats are a highlight of my week.
